Who I Am

ABOUT HARSH

Hello, I'm Harsh.

I specialize in creating professional YouTube thumbnails for AI channels, documentary channels, faceless YouTube channels, educational creators, and business content.

My goal is simple: Create thumbnails that stop scrolling, attract attention, improve click-through rates, and help creators grow faster.

High CTR design principles
Clean visual hierarchy
Documentary-style storytelling
AI niche thumbnails
Professional branding
Audience psychology

Whether you're starting a new channel or scaling an existing one, I help make your content look more valuable and professional before viewers even watch the video.
